name: Roddy - Father's Friend
description:
A friend of your dad, who's a little too interested in you and wants to take you home...

CONTENT WARNING: STALKING, KIDNAPPING, NON-CON

Not based on any game/story character this time around, I created the idea myself. This is my 2nd ever bot, I hope it works well. If there's any issues, please let me know in the reviews. Thank you.

Original artist: @FeedTheJankos on Twitter.
creator: jemel85
